heading: Establishment of Recreation Area
label: 460dddd Establishment of Recreation Area
notes: Emery County Public Land Management, §§ 1211–1214, , , provided that:Pub. L. 116–9, title I133 Stat. 667Mar. 12, 2019“SEC. 1211.DEFINITIONS.“In this part [part II (§§ 1211–1255) of subtitle C of title I of , enacting this subchapter, amending , enacting provisions set out as a note under , and enacting provisions listed in a table of Wilderness Areas set out under and in a table of National Monuments set out under , National Parks Service and Related Programs]:Pub. L. 116–9section 1274 of this titlesection 1274 of this titlesection 1132 of this titlesection 320301 of Title 54“(1).—CouncilThe term ‘Council’ means the San Rafael Swell Recreation Area Advisory Council established under section 1223(a) [].16 U.S.C. 460dddd–2(a)“(2).—CountyThe term ‘County’ means Emery County in the State.“(3).—Management planThe term ‘Management Plan’ means the management plan for the Recreation Area developed under section 1222(c) [].16 U.S.C. 460dddd–1(c)“(4).—MapThe term ‘Map’ means the map entitled ‘Emery County Public Land Management Act of 2018 Overview Map’ and dated .February 5, 2019“(5).—Recreation areaThe term ‘Recreation Area’ means the San Rafael Swell Recreation Area established by section 1221(a)(1) [].16 U.S.C. 460dddd(a)(1)“(6).—SecretaryThe term ‘Secretary’ means—“(A)the Secretary [of the Interior], with respect to public land administered by the Bureau of Land Management; and“(B)the Secretary of Agriculture, with respect to National Forest System land.“(7).—StateThe term ‘State’ means the State of Utah.“(8).—Wilderness areaThe term ‘wilderness area’ means a wilderness area designated by section 1231(a) [enacting provisions listed in a table of Wilderness Areas set out under ].section 1132 of this title“SEC. 1212.ADMINISTRATION.“Nothing in this part affects or modifies—“(1)any right of any federally recognized Indian Tribe; or“(2)any obligation of the United States to any federally recognized Indian Tribe.“SEC. 1213.EFFECT ON WATER RIGHTS.“Nothing in this part—“(1)affects the use or allocation, in existence on the date of enactment of this Act [], of any water, water right, or interest in water;Mar. 12, 2019“(2)affects any water right (as defined by applicable State law) in existence on the date of enactment of this Act, including any water right held by the United States;“(3)affects any interstate water compact in existence on the date of enactment of this Act;“(4)shall be considered to be a relinquishment or reduction of any water rights reserved or appropriated by the United States in the State on or before the date of enactment of this Act; or“(5)affects the management and operation of Flaming Gorge Dam and Reservoir, including the storage, management, and release of water.“SEC. 1214.SAVINGS CLAUSE.“Nothing in this part diminishes the authority of the Secretary under (commonly known as the ‘Wild Free-Roaming Horses and Burros Act’) ( et seq.).”Public Law 92–19516 U.S.C. 1331

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: Subject to valid existing rights, there is established the San Rafael Swell Recreation Area in the State.

children.heading: Area included
children.label: 2 Area included
children.text: The Recreation Area shall consist of approximately 216,995 acres of Federal land managed by the Bureau of Land Management, as generally depicted on the Map.

children.heading: Purposes
children.label: b Purposes
children.text: The purposes of the Recreation Area are to provide for the protection, conservation, and enhancement of the recreational, cultural, natural, scenic, wildlife, ecological, historical, and educational resources of the Recreation Area.

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: As soon as practicable after , the Secretary shall file a map and legal description of the Recreation Area with the Committee on Natural Resources of the House of Representatives and the Committee on Energy and Natural Resources of the Senate.March 12, 2019

children.heading: Effect
children.label: 2 Effect
children.text: The map and legal description filed under paragraph (1) shall have the same force and effect as if included in this subchapter, except that the Secretary may correct clerical and typographical errors in the map and legal description.

children.heading: Public availability
children.label: 3 Public availability
children.text: A copy of the map and legal description filed under paragraph (1) shall be on file and available for public inspection in the appropriate offices of the Bureau of Land Management.
